certificates.name: Machine Learning Specialization
certificates.description: Foundational Machine Learning program covering supervised learning (linear regression, logistic regression, neural networks, decision trees, random forests, and boosted trees), unsupervised learning (clustering, dimensionality reduction, recommender systems), and reinforcement learning. Emphasizes building production-ready ML systems.

certificates.name: Python Data Structures
certificates.description: Introduction to the core data structures of the Python programming language. Explores how to use the Python built-in data structures such as lists, dictionaries, and tuples to perform increasingly complex data analysis.

certificates.name: IBM Cybersecurity Analyst Professional Certificate
certificates.description: A comprehensive 14-course professional certificate program providing a foundation for entry-level cybersecurity analyst roles. Covers defensive and offensive security practices, security operations, governance, and real-world case studies aligned with industry standards. Aligned with CompTIA Security+ (SY0-601) and CompTIA CySA+ fundamentals.

certificates.name: Cyber Security Fundamentals
certificates.description: Foundational certification covering essential cybersecurity concepts including threat landscape, cryptography, network security, risk management, and security best practices.

certificates.name: Core Designer Certificate
certificates.description: Professional certification demonstrating expertise in designing and implementing end-to-end data science workflows using Dataiku's visual interface and automation capabilities.

certificates.name: ML Practitioner Certificate
certificates.description: Validates hands-on skills in building, training, and deploying machine learning models using Dataiku's platform for practical data science applications.

certificates.name: Python for Data Science
certificates.description: Foundational certification demonstrating the ability to write Python scripts and perform hands-on data analysis using IBM's Jupyter-based lab environment.

certificates.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Apps and Agents Developer Associate
certificates.description: Validates the skills to plan and manage Azure AI solutions and build generative AI and agentic applications using Azure AI services — spanning computer vision, text analysis, and information extraction.
skills: Plan and manage an Azure AI solution

certificates.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer Associate
certificates.description: Demonstrates expertise in designing and implementing AI solutions using Azure Cognitive Services, Azure Machine Learning, and Knowledge Mining.

certificates.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Scientist Associate
certificates.description: Validates skills in applying machine learning techniques to train, evaluate, and deploy models using Azure Machine Learning and MLflow.

certificates.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Fundamentals
certificates.description: Foundational knowledge of machine learning and artificial intelligence concepts and related Microsoft Azure services.

certificates.name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2024 Generative AI Certified Professional
certificates.description: Professional certification demonstrating proficiency in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Generative AI services and implementation strategies.
